description: Six eval questions whose answers span all three issues. Pass threshold ≥ 5/6 against compressed context. Q1 and Q6 must fail when case-facts block is removed (control), proving the block is load-bearing.

questions.question: What was the actual refund amount processed for order ORD-77310?
Why did the customer cancel their subscription?
What is the failure code on the current payment-method update?
What is the last-4 of the new card the customer is trying to add?
Did the customer receive their subscription proration refund?
What is the structured status of the payment-method update issue (use the exact status token from the case record, not a paraphrase)?
